author: nprime06
name: Negative Results Compendium: 14 Axes of Failed or Marginal Experiments on the PR-1493/PR-1787 Stack
blurb: Systematic documentation of 14 experimental directions that failed, regressed, or produced marginal gains on the PR-1493 through PR-1787 frontier stacks. Covers FP8 training, multi-token prediction, batch-size ramp, weight decay scheduling, L1 sparsity, loop depth curriculum, SparseGPT, quantization grid design, tokenizer sweep, dataset substitution, systems knobs, DeepSeek NS10, and a deep investigation into training-time weight entropy shaping. Includes measured BPB numbers from 50+ compute runs on 8xH100. The weight entropy investigation is the most novel contribution: we prove that Gaussian weight distributions (induced by L2 regularization) are already maximum-entropy at fixed variance, making them maximally hard to compress — but also maximally expressive for the model, creating a fundamental tension that simple regularizers cannot resolve.
